info.title: Vendaze API
info.description: The Vendaze API lets you build integrations with Vendaze, a B2B CRM for sales teams. All endpoints require OAuth 2.1 authentication and are scoped to a specific workspace.

tags.name: People
tags.description: Manage contacts (individual people) in the workspace.

tags.name: Deals
tags.description: Manage sales deals in the pipeline.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Manage tasks assigned to sales reps.

tags.name: Activities
tags.description: Log activities such as calls, emails, and meetings.

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: Manage tags used to categorize contacts and deals.

post.description: Register a new OAuth app to obtain client credentials. Credentials are sent by email. No authentication required.

201.description: App registered. Credentials sent by email.

get.description: Redirects the user to the Vendaze authorization page to log in and approve scopes. This is the starting point of the OAuth 2.1 Authorization Code flow.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Must exactly match a registered redirect URI.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Space-separated list of scopes. Example: `people:read deals:write`.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Random CSRF token. Returned unchanged to your redirect URI.

post.description: Exchange an authorization code for tokens, or refresh an existing access token using a refresh token.
Revoke an access token or refresh token. Returns 200 whether or not the token was already revoked.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of people (contacts) in the authorized workspace.

parameters.name: full_name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive partial match on full name.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Case-insensitive partial match on job title.

parameters.name: tag[]
parameters.description: Filter by one or more tag names. All tags must match (AND).

post.description: Creates a new person in the authorized workspace.

get.description: Returns a person by ID, including embedded company, tags, lists, and custom fields.

patch.description: Updates a person. Only fields included in the request body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a person. The record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of companies in the authorized workspace.

parameters.name: full_name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive partial match on company name.

get.description: Returns a company by ID, including embedded tags, lists, and custom fields.
Returns a paginated list of deals in the authorized workspace.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive partial match on deal name.

parameters.name: forecast_after
parameters.description: Filter by forecast close date after this timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

get.description: Returns a deal by ID, including embedded pipeline, stage, products, and custom fields.
Returns activities. At least one entity filter (`person_id`, `company_id`, or `deal_id`) is required.

post.description: Creates an activity. At least one entity (`person_id`, `company_id`, or `deal_id`) must be provided.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.1 access token obtained via the Authorization Code flow.

created_after.name: created_after
created_after.description: Return only records created after this timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

created_before.name: created_before
created_before.description: Return only records created before this timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

updated_after.name: updated_after
updated_after.description: Return only records updated after this timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

updated_before.name: updated_before
updated_before.description: Return only records updated before this timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

error.message: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in 60 seconds.

value.description: Options array for select/multi_select fields; null for others.

description.example: Syncs contacts between Vendaze and MyApp.

token.description: The access or refresh token to revoke.
